title: DJ Silkes' Clubhouse
description: This is a small modpack that improves the vanilla feel.
body:
This is a small modpack that improves the vanilla feel.

 
It includes a bunch of mods, that improves the performance of the game:

    more fps
    less memory
    Optifine compatible
    Shader compatible

 
On top of that are handpicked quality of life mods:

     Minimap and Worldmap (Xaero's Maps)
     You don't lose the items when you die, instead a grave spawns (Universal Graves)
     You see more info around your hunger bar (Apple Skin)
     You see what block you are looking at, and with which tool you can break it (Jade)
     Improvements like chest sorting, and inventory improvements (Mouse Tweaks, Inventory Profiles Next)
     You can see all available items and recopies in your inventory (REI)
     You can see much more in the distance (Bobby)
     The Trees will break down completely if you hold shift (Tree harvester)
     The Crops will replant if you use your hoe (Crop replanter)
     You can build double doors, that will open simultaneously (Double Doors)
